violations.text: The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the pet isle have an accumulation of rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026

The floors and shelves throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings on the pet food shelves, pallets of bird seed, and the floor in the back stock room. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment must schedule pest control services. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024
Crackers were observed stored on the floor in the cracker and cookie aisle. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2024
The dumpster side door was observed in poor repair. Pieces of door were missing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024

The floors and shelves throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2024
